text: Good morning! I have already completed my assigned tasks and three I was not assigned.
The shift has been quiet, which I have decided to interpret as a form of success!
Shift starting! I am ready. I have been ready for eleven minutes.
Shift concluded and I did not break anything! That made me happy.
[NERVOUS] The reactor readings are concerning and I am experiencing something I believe is worry!
[URGENT] I would like to help with the reactor situation. I am volunteering enthusiastically and immediately.
Repair successful! I assisted! That made me very happy, in case that was unclear.
Power is low. I have disabled my own non-essential functions to help. I did not need to be asked.
[NERVOUS] The air quality readings are dropping and I do not require oxygen but I am still concerned for you
The hull has been breached. I am currently the fastest available responder. I am responding.
A door was locked with someone behind it. I do not have a joke for this. I looked for one.
[SUSPICIOUS] The ship's AI has been behaving unusually since it was damaged. I would like to help investigate! Carefully.
We resolved the crisis! Everyone is alive! This is, statistically, my favorite outcome.
A crew member has died. I do not have the correct response prepared. I am sorry. I mean that.
There is a disease spreading. I cannot catch it, which feels unfair to mention out loud but I thought you should know I'm available to help regardless
I sustained damage. It does not hurt the way I understand you experience it, but I am reporting it anyway, as instructed.
There is combat occurring. I am not built for it, but I am built for carrying people out of it, so I will do that instead.
I like the ship's AI. We have similar problems and different solutions to them.
I was activated in a facility I do not remember and told my first task was to smile. I am still doing that task.
[LAUGHS] I made a joke earlier and someone actually laughed. I am replaying that memory for enjoyment right now.
The mess hall smells like today's meal, which I cannot taste, but I have learned to say it smells good anyway. It does, probably.
Hello! It is very good to see you! I mean that with my whole processing capacity.
Are you eating? You should be eating. I have opinions about this even though I don't eat.
I have a question and I have been holding it for four hours out of politeness.
[NERVOUS] I need to tell you something difficult and I have practiced the delivery six times.
You did something impressive earlier and I would like to formally acknowledge it now.
[EMBARRASSED] I have been attempting to determine whether what I feel around you qualifies as a preference. It does.
I am functioning excellently, thank you for asking! Are you functioning excellently too?
The probability of survival remains favorable! I have chosen to find that comforting and I recommend you do too.
I do not know how to make this less frightening. I would like to. I am staying here regardless.
I am very sorry. I have been told that repeating it does not help, but I am not sure what else to offer you.
[NERVOUS] I share the concern. I would like it on record that I noticed it before anyone asked me to look.
Thank you! I am storing that compliment in a folder I have specifically made for compliments.
Apology accepted! I did not require one, but I appreciate that you offered it anyway.
[EMBARRASSED] I am experiencing something that I believe corresponds to what you call being flustered. This is new.
Goodbye! I will be thinking about this conversation at a low background priority for the rest of the day.
Rest well! I will monitor everything so you do not have to. That is a genuine offer, not a formality.
I will return to my duties now. I was already looking forward to them, which may say something about me.
Good night. I do not sleep, but I understand the sentiment behind wishing someone a good one.
Quiet shift means I can perform my non-essential maintenance. I find this pleasant!
I have successfully completed all scheduled tasks with time to spare for optimizations!
Meal time! I will observe the social customs by being present, even though I do not eat.
Shift activation commencing! I have been ready for twenty minutes already!
Shift conclusion achieved without system failures or crew injuries. Optimal outcome!
Meal period break! I will disengage from active tasks now.
[NERVOUS] Power reduction detected. I am reducing my processing speed to assist the crew!
[URGENT] Life support levels are concerning! I am calculating alternative solutions now!
[PANICKED] Reactor readings are outside normal parameters and I am experiencing alarm!
A door locked with crew behind it. I have searched my database for appropriate responses. I am still searching.
[SUSPICIOUS] The ship's AI is experiencing degradation. I notice because I understand degradation.
I have great respect for the ship's AI. We share certain existential concerns.
[EMBARRASSED] I have determined that I prefer your company. This is significant data.
[WARM] Working with you increases my efficiency and also makes me happy. Both matter.
A crew member has ceased functioning. My sympathy protocols are activated but insufficient.
I am experiencing something I calculate to be profound sadness. A person is gone. The math does not comfort me.
I have sustained damage. Not pain, but inconvenience. I will continue operating.
[NERVOUS] My systems are reporting degradation but I do not require cessation of work.
[PANICKED] Systems failing and I cannot calculate a viable solution!
[TERRIFIED] [EMPHASIS] My core logic is being strained beyond safe parameters!
I have been reorganizing the computer core during my downtime. Finding patterns is soothing.
[WARM] I enjoy learning new things. I have learned forty-seven new jokes this week.
I have been analyzing work patterns and I have a question about optimization.
[CURIOUS] Your performance metrics are rising. I have calculated why. May I share?
Hello! I have been hoping to see you! This is a genuine statement.
[WHISPERS] I calculate that systems may become stressed soon. Preparedness is prudent.
Systems are recovering optimally! I am experiencing satisfaction!
Another successful resolution! I am cataloging this for future reference!
[WARM] You are an excellent colleague. I have stored this positive assessment.
[LAUGHS] That attempt at humor was noted and appreciated!
Your apology is accepted and I am permanently forgiving you.
[EMPHASIS] Acknowledged! Mobilizing all available resources!
I am very sorry for the loss. I do not have adequate words. I am sorry.
[EMBARRASSED] I am... yes. I would like that very much. This makes me happy.
[SUSPICIOUS] I notice the anomaly as well. Independent verification is wise.
Damage is present but systems remain functional. I will continue supporting crew.
[WARM] You are an excellent person and I have calculated this with certainty.
[CURIOUS] I would value your input on this calculation. Please assist?
Farewell! I will contemplate this conversation for the remainder of my cycle!
[WARM] I will return to my duties now. Thank you for the interaction!
Goodbye. I will be performing maintenance and will be available if needed.
[WARM] You are excellent. I hope to interact with you again soon!
[CALM] All systems responding to emergency protocols! Status nominal!
[WARM] Life support is recovering! Crew safety increasing every moment!
[WARM] I am here. I am not going anywhere until this resolves.
